footer.tagline: Software Engineer · Full Stack · Vue · Node · Flutter

home.hero-text: There was a time I used to gaze at websites and wonder, "Someone out there builds this." Now — I am that someone. I design and ship production-grade software across the stack.

about.p1: There was a time I used to gaze at websites and wonder, "Someone out there builds this." Now — I am that someone.
about.p2After: with a self-made path: no college, no expensive courses, no titles I didn't earn. One day I opened an HTML file and began.
about.p3: Since then, every line of code has been a line in my own book — written carefully, with meaning, and above all — so it works.
about.p4: I design and ship production-grade software across the stack: from pixel-perfect interfaces to scalable backends, APIs, and cross-platform apps. I don't just write code — I architect systems, choose the right tools, and deliver solutions that last.
